title: Rockets
description: Launch vehicles available in the Mission Configurator. Single file at data/rockets.json. Per-locale editorial content in data/i18n/[locale]/rockets/[id].json (rocket-overlay schema).

first_flight.description: Year of first orbital flight; omit for PLANNED vehicles

payload_to_mars_definition.description: What payload_to_mars_kg actually measures: trans-Mars injection (mass on Mars trajectory), Mars orbit insertion (mass captured into Mars orbit), or Mars surface (mass landed). The same vehicle can have very different numbers depending on which is meant.

delta_v_capability_km_s.description: Cumulative ∆v from LEO to upper-stage burnout for trans-Mars injection

data_quality.description: Confidence in the spec values. 'good' = published vendor user guide or demonstrated. 'partial' = derived from related figures or vendor target. 'reconstructed' = back-calculated from a single demonstrated mission.
